title: Collapse Operation and Game Loop Integration
description: Split Collapse from TRADE-10 into a dedicated ticket. Implement collapse execution and preview in RoutePlanningTool, then align collapse behavior with the trade game loop so route changes, hierarchy transitions, and turn-flow side effects remain consistent.
definition-of-done: Collapse can be selected and confirmed from RoutePlanningTool. Preview clearly shows removed pipe segments, internal crossing additions, and endpoint reconnection. Collapse preserves a single loop invariant across tested chains and fully supports undo/redo. Collapse side effects are validated against game-loop expectations (input flow, route state, and turn progression invariants).
testing-plan: Build a route with at least 4 nodes and execute collapse between non-adjacent endpoints. Verify preview before confirm and ensure final topology is a single loop. Run undo/redo through mixed Pipe/Grow/Collapse history. Validate collapse behavior while switching modes and during normal turn-loop interactions. Add automation assertions for collapse state exposure and confirmation path.
todos: Implement collapse execution path in RoutePlanningTool.executeCollapse
Implement collapse preview rendering in RoutePlanningTool.drawCollapsePreview
Add collapse selection/validation guards for invalid endpoint combinations
Expose collapse-relevant route state in automation payloads
Add collapse scenario to trade automation validation script
unknowns: Exact game-loop invariants collapse must preserve beyond loop topology
How collapse should interact with future turn economics and route upkeep updates
Whether collapse should be limited by hierarchy depth or permit cross-level operations
